meaning: Alif Lam Meem Ra (special Quranic opening letters)
that (feminine, farther away, pointing to ءَايٰتُ/verses)
and that which (connects to تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ)
of the people (possessed by أَكْثَرَ - most)
of the heavens/skies (object of رَفَعَ - raised)
and He controlled/subjected (the sun and moon)
the sun (object of وَسَخَّرَ - and He subjected)
and the moon (object of وَسَخَّرَ - He subjected)
it flows/runs (subject of كُلٌّ - each one)
for an appointed time (relates to يَجْرِى - runs/moves)
the matter (being managed by يُدَبِّرُ - He manages)
he explains in detail (subject of يُدَبِّرُ - he arranges)
the signs or miracles (object of يُفَصِّلُ)
so that you all (might) (connected to تُوقِنُونَ - you all are certain)
you all become completely sure (about meeting your Lord)
the one who (connects وَهُوَ to what follows)
the earth (object of مَدَّ - spread out)
and he made/put (something that is mentioned in فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنْهٰرًا)
in it (feminine, referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
mountains (as firmly fixed anchors) (object of جَعَلَ)
and from (connects to كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ - 'all fruits')
he made/placed (connected to رَوٰسِىَ mountains and أَنْهٰرًا rivers)
in it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
two pairs (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
the night (object being covered by يُغْشِى)
for a people who stand together (subject of يَتَفَكَّرُونَ)
and in (connected to الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
pieces (as the subject of the sentence)
multiple things next to each other (with emphasis)
from/of (after a word ending in ن or م)
pairs (of palm trees growing from same root) in general
pairs (of date palms growing from same root)
it is given drink (object of بِمَآءٍ وٰحِدٍ)
with water (used to water يُسْقَىٰ plants)
and we make superior (some over others in taste)
the fruit/produce (that is being compared in taste/quality)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the signs in the previous ayah)
surely/indeed signs (emphasized signs in إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ)
you (are) amazed (in response to إِن if)
then [it is] a wonder! (connected to تَعْجَبْ - you wonder)
Is it true that we...? (expressing disbelief)
a creation (being acted upon in this ayah)
by/with their master/nurturer (referring to those who disbelieve)
and those (pointing to the disbelievers mentioned before)
their necks (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier as ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا)
and those (referring to the disbelievers mentioned)
companions (plural, subject of هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ)
they/them (referring to those who disbelieved in بِرَبِّهِمْ)
in it (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)
and they seek to hurry you
with the evil deed (what they are hastening for in يَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ)
of the good deed (object of يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ with قَبْلَ)
it/she passed away (referring to examples/punishments مَثُلَات)
upon/on (preposition showing responsibility for ظُلْمِهِمْ - their wrongdoing)
why not/if only (expressing regret about أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of يَعْلَمُ)
she carries/bears (subject of what each female carries)
by/with a measure (describing how everything is with Allah)
from you all (referring to those who hide or reveal their speech)
he spoke openly (contrasts with أَسَرَّ/spoke secretly)
female angels who follow very closely/persistently (subject of يَحْفَظُونَهُ)
they protect/guard him (referring to how the guardians protect each person)
Allah (as the object of يُغَيِّرُ - changes)
they change intensively (subject of حَتَّىٰ - until)
that which (object of يُغَيِّرُ - He changes)
and when (connecting to previous statement about Allah not changing people's condition)
so there is no/then there is no (negating مَرَدَّ)
from/of (after a word ending in ن or م)
he/it (independent form that stands alone) (subject of يُرِيكُمُ - shows you)
he shows you all (البَرْقَ - the lightning)
the lightning (what Allah shows in يُرِيكُمُ)
fearfully (describing how He shows you the lightning)
and in eager desire/hope (describing how Allah shows you the lightning)
and He creates/brings forth (subject is هُوَ)
the clouds (being brought forth by يُنشِئُ)
the heavy ones (describing السَّحَابَ - the clouds)
and he glorifies repeatedly/perfectly (subject: ٱلرَّعْدُ - the thunder)
with/by his praise (acted on by يُسَبِّحُ)
and he sends (connected to يُسَبِّحُ - glorifies)
the thunderbolts (object of يُرْسِلُ - he sends)
and then he hits/will hit (بِهَا refers to الصَّوٰعِقَ - the thunderbolts)
with it (referring to الصَّوٰعِقَ - the thunderbolts)
and they (while they dispute about Allah)
strong/intense (subject of وَهُوَ - and He is)
for him/it (referring to دَعْوَةُ ٱلْحَقِّ - the call of truth)
they call upon/pray to (subject of لَا يَسْتَجِيبُونَ)
with/by anything (what the false gods cannot respond with)
like one who spreads out (describing someone trying to grasp water in this ayah)
his two palms (like one stretching out)
so that/in order that he reaches (كَبٰسِطِ - like one who stretches)
his mouth (object of لِيَبْلُغَ - to reach)
he (referring to reaching/بٰلِغ in this ayah)
and their shadows (that prostrate to Allah)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
who (asking about the Lord of the heavens and earth)
Lord (subject of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)
say! (commanding one person to tell others about Allah)
did you all take for yourselves?
protectors, guardians (as objects of اتَّخَذْتُم - you have taken)
for/to their selves (objects that يَمْلِكُونَ don't benefit)
the blind one (contrasted with ٱلْبَصِيرُ/the seeing one)
and the one who sees/perceives deeply (opposite of الْأَعْمَىٰ)
or (connecting two equal questions: 'Are the blind and seeing equal OR have they made partners...')
or (connecting two questions about هَلْ تَسْتَوِى)
and so it became similar (to خَلْقِهِۦ - His creation)
upon them (refers to the false partners/شُرَكَآءَ mentioned in the ayah)
Allah (as the answer to 'Who is the Lord of the heavens and earth?')
The One (a name of Allah showing His absolute uniqueness)
The All-Dominant (one of Allah's names showing His complete power over all creation)
he sent down (referring to Allah sending down rain)
water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
and then she/it flowed (after مَآءً water)
by its measure (referring to the valleys)
and so it carried itself (subject of السَّيْلُ/the flood)
foam (object being carried by السَّيْلُ/the flood)
then as for (connects to فَيَذْهَبُ - then it goes away)
then he goes away/vanishes (describing what happens to الزَّبَدُ - the foam)
and as for (contrasts with فَأَمَّا in previous ayah)
that which (refers to what benefits people in يَنفَعُ ٱلنَّاسَ)
the people (object of يَنفَعُ - what benefits)
the earth/land (being acted upon by فِى)
like that (referring to the previous example in the ayah)
Allah (as the subject of يَضْرِبُ - He sets forth)
the examples (object of يَضْرِبُ - sets forth)
they responded willingly (to رَبِّهِمُ - their Lord)
to/for their lord (connected to ٱسْتَجَابُوا۟ - they responded)
all together (describing how something is done)
and its equivalent (referring to what is in the earth)
surely they would free/save themselves (by giving something valuable)
the counting and tracking of deeds (part of سُوٓءُ)
and how evil! (criticizing جَهَنَّمُ as a resting place)
the place that is spread out (subject of بِئْسَ - how wretched)
Then is the one who (connected to يَعْلَمُ)
to you (object of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
from (connects رَبِّكَ to what comes before it)
the truth/reality (subject of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
like who, like the one who
only/indeed only (restricts what follows in أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ)
he remembers/takes heed (in response to يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
they fulfill (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)
the covenant (object of يُوفُونَ - they fulfill)
and those who (who join what Allah has ordered to be joined)
they join/maintain connections (referring to those who maintain what Allah has ordered to be maintained)
what (that which connects وَٱلَّذِينَ يَصِلُونَ with أَمَرَ)
harm, trouble (object of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)
the reckoning (object of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)
seeking earnestly (object of صَبَرُوا - they were patient)
their Lord (referring to those who are patient seeking Allah's face)
we provided them (referring to what Allah gave them)
secretly (describes how they spent in أَنفَقُوا۟)
and openly (describes how they spent in the previous phrase وَأَنفَقُوا۟)
and they push away (referring to those who are patient mentioned earlier in verse)
those (pointing to a group far away)
for them (belongs to أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ - those people)
gardens (subject of يَدْخُلُونَهَا - they enter them)
he became good/righteous (connected to مَن who/whoever)
and their descendants/offspring (connected to ءَابَآئِهِمْ وَأَزْوٰجِهِمْ - their fathers and spouses)
upon you all (greeting in سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُم)
you (all) endured patiently (because of which you receive سَلٰمٌ/peace)
they break/violate (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)
from (connects بَعْدِ to what comes before it)
that (connects to يُوصَلَ - to be joined)
it is joined/connected (what Allah commanded to be joined)
and they corrupt/are corrupting (connected to يَنقُضُونَ - they break)
the curse (subject of لَهُمُ - belongs to them)
evil (subject of لَهُمْ - belongs to them)
and he measures/restricts (paired with يَبْسُطُ - he extends)
with/by the life (connected to وَفَرِحُوا۟ - and they rejoiced)
except (what follows from what came before)
and he says (subject of لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ)
why not (questioning the disbelievers' demand for a sign)
indeed/certainly (introduces the statement that اللَّهَ يُضِلُّ - Allah misguides)
whoever (subject of يُضِلُّ - He leads astray)
and she/it becomes at peace (subject: قُلُوبُهُم - their hearts)
it becomes at peace (subject: قُلُوبُهُم - their hearts)
they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)
a final place of return (possessed by حُسْنُ)
a community (being described in this ayah)
she/it passed by (referring to أُمَّةٍ - a community)
so that you two recite (with emphasis)
he (refers to الرَّحْمٰنِ - The Most Merciful)
and to him/it (connected to مَتَابِ - return)
it was made to move (referring to الْجِبَالُ - the mountains)
the mountains (subject of سُيِّرَتْ - were moved)
or (connecting قُطِّعَتْ with كُلِّمَ as alternative possibilities)
it (feminine) was cut intensively/into many pieces
the earth (subject of being split/torn apart)
with/by means of it (referring to قُرْءَانًا)
Rather/instead (contrasting with the previous statement about moving mountains)
all together (describing how something is done in relation to هَدَى/guided)
that (introduces the clause لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ - if Allah willed)
all the people (as the object being guided by Allah)
it strikes them (referring to a disaster striking the disbelievers)
because of what (referring to صَنَعُوا - they did/made)
a calamity (that strikes them because of what they did)
he comes/arrives (until وَعْدُ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's promise)
Allah (as the object of يَأْتِىَ - comes)
he breaks/will break (the promise) (negated by لا)
before you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in مِّن قَبْلِكَ meaning 'before you')
so I gave extra time (to those who disbelieved)
then (connects this part to أَخَذْتُهُمْ/I seized them)
is it then who (questioning the one who is قَآئِمٌ/maintaining)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
of/in/on the earth (connected to فِى in this ayah)
with/by something apparent (connected to يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
rather/but rather (corrects the previous statement about شُرَكَآءَ partners)
for those who (connected to مَكْرُهُمْ - their plot)
their plot (that was made attractive to them)
and they were blocked/prevented (from السَّبِيلِ - the path)
He (Allah) lets go astray (whoever He wills)
then what/then not (connects to يُضْلِلِ - leads astray)
a guide (after مِنْ in this ayah)
and surely the punishment (of الْآخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)
and not (there is for them from اللَّهِ)
the one who/which (feminine) (describes الْجَنَّةِ - the garden)
beneath it (referring to الْجَنَّةِ - the garden)
its food/sustenance (referring to الْجَنَّةِ - the garden/paradise)
and its shade (connected to أُكُلُهَا - its food)
that (feminine, far) (pointing to عُقْبَى - the end result)
they (those who were given the Book) feel joy/happiness
part of it (acted upon by يُنكِرُ - denies)
I was commanded (in response to قُلْ - he said)
that (connecting أُمِرْتُ 'I was commanded' to أَعْبُدَ 'I worship')
that I worship (after أُمِرْتُ أَنْ - I was commanded that)
Allah (as the object of أَعْبُدَ - I worship)
and not (connects to أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)
place of return (connected to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)
after what (follows جَآءَكَ - came to you)
what/that which (connects to جَآءَكَ - came to you)
for you (connected to مِنَ ٱللَّهِ - from Allah)
We sent (subject of verb, taking رُسُلًا as its object)
he was (past tense verb in this ayah)
an appointed time/deadline (possessed by something else)
and he makes firm (after يَمْحُوا - he erases)
we will surely show you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
some/part of (object of نُرِيَنَّكَ - we show you)
the one who/which (describes what نَعِدُهُمْ refers to)
we will definitely take/receive you completely
the conveyance (subject of being upon you)
And have they not yet...? (connecting negative question marker)
the earth (object being affected by نَأْتِى - we come to)
we decrease it (referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
and God (as the subject of يَحْكُمُ)
any who can reverse/review (لا before it means 'there is no')
for His judgment (referring to Allah's judgment that none can reverse)
before them (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)
the plotting (referring to the plotting mentioned in وَقَدْ مَكَرَ)
all together (describing how something is done)
the disbelievers (subject of سَيَعْلَمُ - will know)
of/for the home/dwelling (end result of عُقْبَى)
a messenger (object of لَسْتَ - you are not)
by Allah (as a witness between كَفَىٰ and شَهِيدًۢا)
as a witness (in relation to كَفَىٰ/sufficient)
between me (connected to وَبَيْنَكُمْ - and between you all)
and between you all (connected to بَيْنِى/between me)
